summary: Russian lawmakers passed a first reading of a bill regulating crypto through licensed intermediaries, with key rules set to take effect in July 2026 and 2027.

title: North Korea tied to heists worth $578M in April after Kelp DAO exploit
summary: DPRK-linked crypto theft topped $578M in April after the Kelp DAO exploit, as attacks continue to expand across protocols, companies and end users.

title: SEC ‘on the cusp’ of onchain tokenized securities exemption: Atkins
summary: SEC Chair Paul Atkins says the SEC is “on the cusp” of an innovation exemption to enable compliant onchain trading of tokenized securities.

title: ‘Powerful move’ looms for Bitcoin price, says Bollinger Bands indicator
summary: Bitcoin’s technical indicators predicted a significant move ahead for BTC, but the price must first break resistance at $80,000.

title: Coinbase shifts New York prediction markets fight to federal court
summary: Coinbase legal chief Paul Grewal says the company removed New York’s prediction markets lawsuit to federal court, setting up a sharper fight over CFTC authority and state gambling laws.

title: Bitcoin Bull Score hits six-month high as 2022 bear-market fears linger
summary: Bitcoin price metrics saw a broad recovery in April, but analysis warns that the 2022 bear-market breakdown could still repeat.

title: Another DeFi protocol hacked as Sui-based Volo hit by $3.5M exploit
summary: Volo Protocol has confirmed a $3.5 million exploit affecting select vaults, adding that it has frozen assets and started fund recovery efforts amid ongoing investigation.

title: Uzbekistan creates state-backed crypto mining zone with tax breaks
summary: Uzbekistan has created a supervised crypto mining zone in Karakalpakstan, allowing foreign sales while requiring proceeds to flow through local bank accounts.
